use_cases: Hero sections with animated scrolling text for visual impact
Landing page section dividers with parallax text effects
Product showcases with dynamically moving text elements
Brand messaging displays with scroll-based animation
Portfolio or creative websites with engaging text animations
ai_summary: A parallax text scroll component that creates a dynamic marquee effect by animating text based on scroll velocity using Framer Motion. The text moves horizontally with smooth spring physics, changing direction based on scroll direction. Designed for visual impact in hero sections, section dividers, or anywhere attention-grabbing animated text is needed.
